description: Every Eventbrite organizer endpoint, plus a local SQLite mirror of your events, orders, and attendees you can search offline — the cross-event search Eventbrite removed, restored over your own data.

novel_features.name: Sales velocity board
novel_features.description: Ranks all your live events by tickets sold per day since on-sale and projects a sell-out date.

novel_features.name: Repeat-attendee finder
novel_features.description: Finds fans who bought into two or more of your events, across your whole synced history.

novel_features.name: Discount-code performance
novel_features.description: Per discount code: redemptions, type, and the redemption rate (share of the code's allotment used).

novel_features.name: Multi-org client roll-up
novel_features.description: Single pane across every organization your token can see: events count, tickets sold, gross, and top event per org.

novel_features.name: Door roster + check-in gap
novel_features.description: Offline attendee roster for one event with checked-in vs not-yet, VIP and comp flags, door-sorted.

novel_features.name: Capacity headroom rollup
novel_features.description: Sold vs total capacity and percent remaining across all your live events at once.

novel_features.name: Refund / cancellation rate
novel_features.description: Refunded and cancelled order counts, refunded revenue, and the rate per event or across the org.

novel_features.name: Top buyers by spend
novel_features.description: Ranks ticket buyers by total spend across all your events, not just by how many events they attended.

novel_features.name: Attendee contact export
novel_features.description: Exports unique attendee contacts (email, name, events attended, check-in status), deduped across all your events and filterable by event.
